verses.text: Whoever believes Jesus is the Christ 'is born of God'; we keep His commandments, and 'his commandments are not grievous.' Born believers. Faith and obedience are light to the loving.
Whoever believes Jesus is the Christ 'is born of God'; we keep His commandments, and 'his commandments are not grievous.' Born believers. Faith and obedience are light to the loving.
Whoever believes Jesus is the Christ 'is born of God'; we keep His commandments, and 'his commandments are not grievous.' Born believers. Faith and obedience are light to the loving.
'This is the victory that overcometh the world, even our faith'; who overcomes but he that believes Jesus is the Son? Faith conquers. Believing overcomes the world.
'This is the victory that overcometh the world, even our faith'; who overcomes but he that believes Jesus is the Son? Faith conquers. Believing overcomes the world.
There are three that bear witness — the Spirit, the water, and the blood — and these agree in one. United witness. All testify that Jesus is the Christ.
There are three that bear witness — the Spirit, the water, and the blood — and these agree in one. United witness. All testify that Jesus is the Christ.
There are three that bear witness — the Spirit, the water, and the blood — and these agree in one. United witness. All testify that Jesus is the Christ.
We receive the witness of God concerning His Son; he that believes has the witness in himself. Inner witness. Faith carries God's testimony within.
We receive the witness of God concerning His Son; he that believes has the witness in himself. Inner witness. Faith carries God's testimony within.
'God hath given to us eternal life, and this life is in his Son'; these things are written 'that ye may know that ye have eternal life.' Assured life. To have the Son is to have life and know it.
'God hath given to us eternal life, and this life is in his Son'; these things are written 'that ye may know that ye have eternal life.' Assured life. To have the Son is to have life and know it.
'God hath given to us eternal life, and this life is in his Son'; these things are written 'that ye may know that ye have eternal life.' Assured life. To have the Son is to have life and know it.
This is our confidence, that if we ask 'according to his will, he heareth us,' and we have what we ask. Heard prayer. Praying in His will is always answered.
This is our confidence, that if we ask 'according to his will, he heareth us,' and we have what we ask. Heard prayer. Praying in His will is always answered.
If you see a brother sin a sin not unto death, pray, and life shall be given. Pray for him. Intercession brings restoring grace.
If you see a brother sin a sin not unto death, pray, and life shall be given. Pray for him. Intercession brings restoring grace.
Whoever is born of God sins not, but keeps himself; 'the whole world lieth in wickedness.' Kept. The child of God is guarded from the evil one.
Whoever is born of God sins not, but keeps himself; 'the whole world lieth in wickedness.' Kept. The child of God is guarded from the evil one.
The Son has come and given us understanding to know Him 'that is true'; 'keep yourselves from idols.' Know the true. Cling to Christ and shun all idols.
The Son has come and given us understanding to know Him 'that is true'; 'keep yourselves from idols.' Know the true. Cling to Christ and shun all idols.
